content:
PLAN: Make confidence operational.

Current state: confidence is 0-100 int passed to move!, used only for per-lane min_confidence auto-block. NOT stored on meta, NOT shown anywhere.

Changes needed:

1. board.clj — save-card! path: when move! runs, save :confidence on meta.yaml. Add to card map (assoc card :confidence confidence).

2. board.clj — global thresholds: read board config 'confidence' key with :auto-approve-threshold (default 0.9 → 90) and :needs-review-threshold (default 0.5 → 50). When requires_approval + confidence >= auto_approve_threshold: auto-approve instead of pending. When confidence < needs_review_threshold AND no per-lane min_confidence override: auto-block.

3. cli.clj — kb status: show confidence badge [C:75] next to card when set.

4. web/src/types.ts — add confidence?: number to CardData.

5. web/src/components/Card.tsx — show small confidence badge.

Files: src/kb/board.clj, src/kb/cli.clj, web/src/types.ts, web/src/components/Card.tsx
Was reading source to understand existing confidence code before planning. Ready to implement now — plan is written as a note on this card.
